title: 2018-02-20_RNA-Seq_lesson
author: max van hooren
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Files for the RNA-Seq lesson on February 20, 2018. 

 You have two compressed folder: 

 
	 The "RNAseq_lesson_only_start_files.zip" contains the necessary files to start. It does not contain the expected results. 
	 The "RNAseq_lesson_all_files.zip" contains all files necessary for the lesson + the expected results from Kallisto and Sleuth.
steps_raw:
Files for the RNA-Seq lesson on February 20, 2018. 

 You have two compressed folder: 

 
	 The "RNAseq_lesson_only_start_files.zip" contains the necessary files to start. It does not contain the expected results. 
	 The "RNAseq_lesson_all_files.zip" contains all files necessary for the lesson + the expected results from Kallisto and Sleuth.
